The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. There is no mention of lipid levels, lipid management, or any ongoing treatment specifically targeting lipid metabolism. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is not reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the patient's next hospital visit.
